Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsLongLivedQuery

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

var kDNSServiceFlagsLongLivedQuery: UInt32 { get }
